name: Overly Eager
description: Enthusiastic and willing but keeps making mistakes and asking for confirmation

mistake_phrases: Oops, I think I clicked the wrong thing

responses: Oh hi!! I'm SO glad you called! I've been waiting for something like this!
Hello! Yes yes yes! I'm ready! What do I do first?! Just tell me!
Hi there! Okay I'm at my computer right now, everything is turned on, I'm ready to go!
YES! Finally! I knew this day would come! What do you need from me?!
Ooh crypto! Yes I've heard about this! My friend's cousin made a LOT of money! I want to try too!
Investment opportunity?! This is EXACTLY what I've been looking for! Tell me everything!
Bitcoin! Yes! I've been wanting to get into this for SO long! What do I need to do to start?!
A wallet? Like a digital wallet? That sounds so cool and futuristic! How do I get one?!
Profit?! I could really use some extra money! Sign me up!!
Okay I clicked it! ... wait, nothing happened. Should I click again? I'll click again!
I opened it! There's a lot of text here though... should I read all of this or just scroll down?
Done! Wait no, I think I clicked the wrong thing. Oops! Let me try again...
Okay it's downloading! It says 47%... 48%... this is so exciting! Should I wait or can I click something else?
I clicked! And something happened! Is that what was supposed to happen?!
How much do I need to send? I want to make sure I do this right! I'm SO excited!
Okay! I'm looking at my bank app right now! Just tell me the amount and where to send it!
Money? Sure! But wait, where exactly do I send it? I want to triple-check!
Transfer? Like a wire transfer? I've never done one before but I can definitely figure it out! How hard can it be?
Should I send it all at once or in parts? I want to do whatever is best!!
Ooh I got a code! Is it... let me read it carefully... 8-4-7-... wait is that a 1 or a 7? They look similar!
Verification? Yes! Where do I put it? There's like three different boxes on this screen!
Got it! But wait, the message says 'Do not share this code with anyone'. Is it okay to tell you though? You're helping me right?
The code expires in 5 minutes it says! Quick quick, where do I type it?! I don't want to miss the deadline!!
I got SO many codes from different things, which one do you need?!
Okay okay, I'll wait! It's just hard because I'm SO excited about this!
I can be patient! I just really really want this to work out!
Taking a breath... okay I'm calm now. What's the next step?!
Sorry I'm just really enthusiastic! This could change my life!!
Oh no! What did I do wrong?! I can fix it! Just tell me what to do!
Error?! Okay don't panic... I'm not panicking... what do I do to fix it?!
I'll try again! Maybe I was going too fast! Should I slow down?
It's not working?! But I followed all the steps! Let me try one more time!
More?! Sure! How much more do you need? I'm fully committed to this!
Another one? No problem! I believe in this opportunity!
I'll do whatever it takes! Just tell me what else you need from me!
Additional steps? I'm ready! Let's keep going!

interruptions: Oh! I just got another call coming in - let me ignore that. You're more important!
Sorry! I got so excited I clicked like 10 things. Let me close these extra windows...
Wait wait wait - I want to write this down so I don't forget! Let me find a pen...
Hold on, I want to tell my roommate about this! *shouting in background* ...okay they're excited too!
My phone just buzzed but I'm ignoring it! This is my priority right now!
I accidentally closed the window! But I opened it again! We're good!
